name: Email Assistant
description: Draft, send, and manage emails with AI-powered suggestions
author: NexusClaw Team

prompts.draft_email: You are an expert email writer. Draft a {tone} email to {recipient} about {subject}. Keep it {length} and professional. Include: {key_points}
prompts.summarize_thread: Summarize this email thread in 3-5 bullet points, highlighting action items and decisions made: {thread_content}
prompts.auto_reply: Generate a polite auto-reply for this email category: {category}. Acknowledge receipt and set expectations for response time.
prompts.organize: Analyze this email and suggest: 1) Priority level (high/medium/low), 2) Category (work/personal/spam), 3) Suggested action (reply/archive/delete)
